channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Oil And Gas
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location: Multiple Locations
Description:

Experienced professionals are sought for various offshore and onshore Oil & Gas projects globally. Positions include Able Seaman, Steward, Motorman, Cook, Welder, 3rd Electrician, Driller, Assistant Driller, Derrickman, Roughnecks, Roustabout, Mechanical Technician, Electronic Technician, Directional Driller, Mechanic, Toolpusher, Rig Mechanic, and Night Toolpusher. Opportunities are available in China, Nigeria, North Sea, Oman, UAE, and Saudi Arabia.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Gas Job Opportunities at SEA Updates

item.description:
Location: Saudi Arabia
Description:

Qualified Chief Engineers, Second Engineers, Third Engineers, ETOs, and Crane Operators are sought for a SPJUB vessel operating on an Aramco project. Minimum experience requirements vary by position, with specific COC and certificate needs. Joining is upon provisional approval and KSA visa issuance. Salary is to be discussed. All documents must be valid for 12 months, and applicants should not hold a valid Saudi Iqama visa.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Engine Officers Crane Operator Jobs on SPJUB Vessel at Aavishka

item.description:
Location: Kirkuk, Iraq
Description:

An Oil & Gas company is seeking a Field Specialist with 3-8 years of experience in Wireline Operations, specifically for land rig operations and wellsite services. Candidates should possess a Diploma or Bachelor's Degree in Engineering and a strong understanding of wireline equipment. The position is based in Kirkuk, Iraq.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Field Specialist Job - Oil Gas Offshore at NES Fircroft

item.description:
Location: Saudi Arabia, UAE, Canada, and offshore locations
Description:

Opportunities are available in the oil and gas sector for skilled and semi-skilled workers in 2026, with many roles offering visa sponsorship and high salaries. Positions such as Roustabout, Floorhand, Welder, Heavy Equipment Operator, Scaffolder, and Pipeline Laborer are in demand. These jobs often involve rotational work schedules, typically 28 days on and 28 days off, and are located in remote or high-risk environments, necessitating competitive compensation packages including accommodation, feeding, and travel allowances.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Jobs With Visa Sponsorship at linkedin

item.description:
Location: Qatar
Description:

Multiple positions are available for an oil and gas company in Qatar, including Welder, Rigger, Deck Crew, Technician, and Crane Operator roles. Benefits include free food, accommodation, medical, and transportation, with 8-hour duty plus overtime. This is a CV selection process for immediate hiring.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Oil Gas Jobs in Qatar - Multiple Positions at QATAR OIL & GAS COMPANY

item.description:
Location: China
Description:

Experienced FPSO professionals are sought for an Owner's Site Team role on a major offshore energy project in China. Key positions include FPSO Superintendent, Construction Site Lead, and Construction/Quality Engineer. Candidates require 15+ years of FPSO, offshore, or module fabrication experience, preferably with previous Owner's Team involvement on large EPC projects. Strong China fabrication yard experience and fluency in Mandarin and English are essential for managing construction and quality delivery.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] FPSO Superintendent Job - Offshore Project at Brunel Greater China

item.description:
Location: Congo
Description:

Urgent rotational positions are available for an Oil & Gas mega project in Congo, focusing on plant construction, EPC, fabrication, and industrial projects. Roles include Welding Engineer, Welding Supervisor, QC Inspector, Planning Engineer, Piping Supervisor, Civil & Structural Engineer, Quantity Surveyor, Mechanical Supervisor, Electrical Superintendent, and Safety Officer. Experience with Aramco is required. The rotation is 28 days on and 28 days off, with 12-hour working days. Accommodation, transportation, and food are provided.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Oil Gas Project Jobs in Congo at Golden Jobs

item.description:
Location: Congo
Description:

Urgent rotational positions are available for an Oil & Gas mega project in Congo, requiring Aramco experience. The project involves plant construction, EPC, fabrication, and industrial works. Successful candidates will work a 28 days on / 28 days off rotation with 12-hour shifts, 7 days a week. Accommodation, transportation, and food are provided. Roles include Welding Engineer, Welding Supervisor, QC Inspector, Planning Engineer, Piping Supervisor, Civil & Structural Engineer, Quantity Surveyor, Mechanical Supervisor, Electrical Superintendent, and Safety Officer.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Oil Gas Project Jobs in Congo at Jobs info

item.description:
Location: Malaysia
Description:

Multiple offshore positions are available on an FPSO vessel operating in Malaysia. Roles include Offshore Installation Manager, Supervisors (Production, Marine, Maintenance, HSE), Technicians (Production, Marine, Mechanical, E&I, Engine Room), Ratings (Bosun, Able Bodied, Roustabout), Pumpman, Medic/Radio Operator, and Crane Operators. Specific contract details and requirements will be provided upon application.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Positions on FPSO Vessel in Malaysia at Golden Jobs

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Build a Career, Not Just a Contract

Deleum Group is a leading Malaysian oil & gas services company with decades of experience supporting major energy projects across Southeast Asia and beyond. We do not just hire manpower — we invest in people who want to grow with us long-term.

Why Deleum?

  • Direct career path — we promote from within, not outsource your future

  • International project exposure — work on platforms, rigs, and offshore installations across Asia-Pacific

  • Full GWO & OPITO training support — we certify you, not bill you

  • Competitive offshore packages — rotation schedules, accommodation, and transport covered

  • HSE-first culture — safety is not a poster on the wall, it is how we operate every day

Our Culture — Work Hard, Live Right

We are not a faceless contractor. Deleum runs an in-house Sports & Recreation club with regular events and team activities. We believe a healthy crew is a safe crew — work-life balance is policy, not a promise. Our people work as a family, not as replaceable units.

Who We Need:

  • Offshore technicians & mechanics

  • Rigging & lifting specialists

  • Scaffolding supervisors & inspectors

  • Coating & surface treatment experts

  • HSE officers & advisors

  • QA/QC inspectors (welding, coating, structural)

  • Marine crew & logistics coordinators

  • Instrumentation & electrical technicians

  • Rope access technicians (IRATA certified)

  • Project engineers & site supervisors

What You Bring:

  • Relevant offshore certifications (BOSIET, GWO, IRATA, CSWIP, NACE, etc.)

  • Experience on oil & gas platforms, FPSOs, rigs, or marine construction projects

  • Commitment to HSE standards — zero compromise

  • Willingness to learn and lead — we train leaders, not followers

Deleum Shared Values:

  • Service Quality — deliver once, deliver right

  • HSE Integrity — every person home safe, every rotation

  • Sustainability — long-term thinking in a short-term industry

Unsolicited applications welcome. If you are motivated, competent, and ready for accountability — we want to hear from you.

Full Crew Premium Advantage: Upgrade to Full Crew Premium to apply directly to Deleum HR with priority CV review. Premium members get first access to new offshore rotations before public posting.



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Offshore Oil & Gas Personnel - (Malaysia & International Projects) at Deleum Group
